download_hsn_sac_directory.description: Download the GST portal's published HSN and SAC directory as a local Excel file with a verification receipt.

errors.message: The published HSN and SAC spreadsheet is not currently available at the GST portal's download location.
errors.user_action: Retry later or use the live GST classification search operations instead.

errors.message: The GST portal download service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same download operation.

bytes.description: Size of the downloaded spreadsheet in bytes.

content_type.description: Media type reported by the GST portal for the downloaded file.

filename.description: Stable filename used for the downloaded spreadsheet.

path.description: Private local path where AgentWeb saved the downloaded spreadsheet.

sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum for identifying and verifying the downloaded file.

pagination.behavior: This operation downloads one current spreadsheet and does not paginate.

download_hsn_sac_directory.when_not_to_use: Do not use a downloaded directory as a substitute for professional classification advice or assume it is legally binding.
download_hsn_sac_directory.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs the full published HSN and SAC spreadsheet for offline analysis or exhaustive local search.

list_advisories.description: List current or archived GSTN advisories for a calendar year with clean text, dates, modules, and links.

errors.message: The requested advisory year is not accepted by the GST portal.
errors.user_action: Provide a four-digit year from 2017 onward and call this operation again.

errors.message: The GST portal advisory service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same advisory request.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by a previous call for the same advisory year.

limit.description: Maximum advisories to return in this page.

year.description: Four-digit calendar year whose GST portal advisories should be returned.

advisories.description: GSTN advisories for the requested year, newest first as returned by the portal.

content.description: Plain-text advisory body with HTML presentation removed.

date.description: Publication date string supplied by the GST portal.

id.description: Stable numeric advisory identifier assigned by the portal.

is_external.description: Whether the advisory's primary destination is outside the GST portal.

link_url.description: External or detail link supplied by the portal, or an empty string when none is supplied.

module.description: GST product area associated with the advisory.

pagination.behavior: AgentWeb fetches the selected year once, then returns a bounded slice. Pass next_cursor back with the same year to continue.
pagination.cursor: Opaque offset into that year's live advisory archive.

list_advisories.when_not_to_use: Do not treat an advisory as legislation; use the GST law operations for acts, rules, notifications, circulars, and orders.
list_advisories.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs current GST portal operational guidance, system-change announcements, or an annual advisory archive.

list_due_dates.description: Return the GST portal's current filing, statement, refund, and quarterly compliance deadlines as structured data.

errors.message: The GST portal's current due-date feed is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry this operation.

due_dates.description: Current filing and compliance dates shown on the GST portal home page.

category_code.description: GST portal display-category code retained for fidelity.

due_date.description: Published due date or rule-based deadline text.

form_or_obligation.description: GST form, facility, or compliance obligation and period.

pagination.behavior: The complete current home-page deadline feed is returned at once.

list_due_dates.when_not_to_use: Do not infer a taxpayer-specific filing obligation from this general feed; applicability can depend on registration type, turnover, state, extensions, and notifications.
list_due_dates.when_to_use: Use this for the current general GST deadlines that would otherwise require opening the portal calendar.

list_gst_law_sources.description: List every official central, state, and union-territory source linked by GSTN for GST laws and legal updates.

errors.message: The GST portal law-source directory is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry this operation.

sources.description: Official central, state, and union-territory websites linked by the GST portal for laws, rules, notifications, amendments, and circulars.

url.description: Official law-source website URL published by GSTN.

pagination.behavior: The complete official jurisdiction directory is returned in one bounded result.

list_gst_law_sources.when_not_to_use: Do not use this as the full text of legislation or as legal advice; it is the GSTN-maintained source directory.
list_gst_law_sources.when_to_use: Use this to discover the authoritative central or state website that publishes GST acts, rules, notifications, circulars, and amendments.

list_gst_statistics.description: List every official GST registration, return, collection, settlement, e-way-bill, and yearwise statistical download.

errors.message: The GST statistics directory is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry this operation.

files.description: All current GSTN statistical workbooks and reports, with the table-row context that identifies each dataset and year.

description.description: Dataset, return type, collection type, and financial-year context shown by GSTN.

filename.description: Published file name, which identifies the dataset where the table row contains only a year.

url.description: Official direct spreadsheet or report URL.

pagination.behavior: The complete current statistics directory is returned in one call.

list_gst_statistics.when_not_to_use: Do not treat these published aggregates as live taxpayer-level data.
list_gst_statistics.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs official GST registration, return, tax-collection, IGST-settlement, e-way-bill, or yearwise revenue datasets.

list_help_resources.description: List every public GSTN help, support, grievance, system-requirement, and taxpayer-facility resource with its official URL.

errors.message: The GST help and taxpayer-facilities directory is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry this operation.

resources.description: Public help, support, system-requirement, media, and grievance resources published by GSTN.

description.description: GSTN's explanation of what the resource provides.

pagination.behavior: The complete current public help directory is returned at once.

list_help_resources.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for account-specific tickets or to submit a grievance; use the returned grievance resource when human follow-up is required.
list_help_resources.when_to_use: Use this to find the current GST knowledge portal, error guides, system requirements, media, grievance channels, nodal officers, or other taxpayer-help destinations without navigating the legacy site.

list_holidays.description: List GST portal centre and state non-working days for one state code and calendar year.

errors.message: The GST portal did not accept the state code or calendar year.
errors.user_action: Call gst.list_states for the exact two-character code, then retry with a four-digit year.

errors.message: The GST portal holiday service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same holiday request.

state_code.description: Assigned two-character GST state or union-territory code from gst.list_states (01 through 38, or 97).

holidays.description: Centre and state non-working days returned by the GST portal.

created_by.description: Portal authorities that published the calendar entry.

date.description: Calendar date string supplied by the GST portal.

day.description: English weekday name supplied by the portal.

descriptions.description: One or more reasons or labels for the non-working day.

state_codes.description: GST state codes to which the entry applies.

pagination.behavior: The portal returns the complete selected state and year calendar in one response.

list_holidays.when_not_to_use: Do not use this as a statutory filing-deadline calendar; use the dedicated GST due-date operation for compliance deadlines.
list_holidays.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs the GST portal's non-working-day calendar for a specific state or union territory.

list_offline_tools.description: List every current GST offline return, ITC, transition, advance-ruling, and IMS utility with its official URL.

errors.message: The GST offline-tool directory is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry this operation.

tools.description: Current GST offline utilities. A URL either downloads the utility directly or opens its versioned download page.

url.description: Current direct download or official versioned download-page URL.

pagination.behavior: The complete current utility index is returned at once.

list_offline_tools.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to file a return or to assume that a Windows-only utility can run in AgentWeb.
list_offline_tools.when_to_use: Use this to discover the current official offline utility or its versioned download page without navigating GST menus.

list_states.description: List GST state and union territory codes, names, and territory classification for other state-scoped operations.

errors.message: The GST portal state-code directory is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same operation.

states.description: States and union territories recognized by the GST portal.

code.description: Two-character GST state or territory code, preserving leading zeroes.

is_union_territory.description: Whether the portal identifies the entry as a union territory.

name.description: Published state or union territory name.

pagination.behavior: The portal returns the complete directory in one response.

list_states.when_not_to_use: Do not infer tax jurisdiction solely from a name; use the exact code required by the target GST operation.
list_states.when_to_use: Use this before a GST operation asks for a state or union territory code and the agent only knows its name.

search_gst_practitioners.description: Search the public GST practitioner register by state, optional name, district, or PIN code, without exposing unnecessary contact data.

errors.message: The practitioner search needs a valid two-digit state code and, when supplied, at least three name characters.
errors.user_action: Use gst.list_states to choose a state code, then correct the search fields and retry.

errors.message: The GST practitioner search service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same search.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous page of the same search.

district_code.description: Optional GST district code within the selected state.

limit.description: Maximum practitioners to return in this page.

name.description: Optional practitioner name fragment; use at least three characters when supplied.

state_code.description: Required two-digit GST state or union-territory code from gst.list_states.

practitioners.description: Matching active or inactive GST practitioner records. Raw phone numbers and email addresses are intentionally omitted.

status.description: GST practitioner status code returned by the portal.

pagination.behavior: AgentWeb returns a bounded slice of the live result and provides next_cursor when more records remain.
pagination.cursor: Opaque offset into the current live result ordering.

search_gst_practitioners.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to contact practitioners, rank them, or infer professional quality; phone and email data are intentionally not returned.
search_gst_practitioners.when_to_use: Use this to locate and verify GST practitioners by public enrolment data and geography.

search_hsn_sac.description: Look up live GST portal HSN or SAC classification suggestions from a known numeric code.

errors.message: The code is empty, too long, or not accepted by the GST portal.
errors.user_action: Provide two to eight digits from an HSN or SAC code and call this operation again.

errors.message: The GST portal classification service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same operation without changing the query.

query.description: Two to eight digits from the HSN or SAC code to look up, such as 8471.

matches.description: Classification suggestions returned by the live GST portal in its own order.

code.description: The HSN or SAC classification code.

description.description: The classification description published by the GST portal.

pagination.behavior: The portal returns a small autocomplete result set and does not expose pagination for this lookup.

search_hsn_sac.when_not_to_use: Do not treat these suggestions as legal classification advice or as a binding statement by GSTN.
search_hsn_sac.when_to_use: Use this when the agent already has part or all of an HSN or SAC code and needs the portal's matching descriptions.

search_hsn_sac_by_description.description: Find live GST portal HSN goods or SAC services classification candidates from a plain-language description.

errors.message: The description is empty, too long, or not accepted by the GST portal.
errors.user_action: Provide a short plain-language goods or services description and call this operation again.

errors.message: The GST portal classification service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same operation without changing the description.

classification_type.description: Whether to search goods HSN classifications or services SAC classifications.

description.description: A plain-language description of the goods or services to classify.

matches.description: Candidate classifications returned by the live GST portal in relevance order.

code.description: The candidate HSN or SAC classification code.

description.description: The candidate classification description published by the GST portal.

pagination.behavior: The portal returns a small autocomplete result set and does not expose pagination for this lookup.

search_hsn_sac_by_description.when_not_to_use: Do not treat candidate matches as legal classification advice or as a binding statement by GSTN.
search_hsn_sac_by_description.when_to_use: Use this when the agent has a goods or services description but does not yet know the corresponding HSN or SAC code.

constraints: Site permissions, rate limits, and anti-automation rules still apply
human_boundaries: A genuine failed-payment CPIN and authorized taxpayer fixture are required to verify PMT-07 preparation and submission safely.
A valid GSTIN or authorized Other ID from a dedicated mapping account is required to reach and verify challan creation without using a third party identity.
A valid refund ARN with known case history from an authorized mapping account is required; only the no-record error path has been verified.
An authorized CPIN or payment reference with known state is required to verify that the public tracker returns the correct payment meaning.
An authorized GSTIN or CPIN with known challan history is required to verify the returned records without probing another taxpayer account.
GST requires a visual CAPTCHA and then email/mobile OTP verification before generating a temporary unregistered-applicant ID; AgentWeb must pause for the applicant.
GST requires a visual CAPTCHA before a TRN application can be resumed, followed by account-bound verification; AgentWeb must show the challenge and pause for the user.
GST requires a visual CAPTCHA before exposing advance-ruling search filters and results; AgentWeb must show the challenge and resume after the user completes it.
GST requires an OTP sent through the account recovery channel before new credentials can be set; AgentWeb must pause for the user to enter it.
GST requires an OTP sent to the registered contact before revealing a username; AgentWeb must pause for the account holder.
GST sends separate OTPs to the applicant email address and mobile number before registration can continue; AgentWeb can fill the form but must pause for the applicant.
No mapping account with the required GST role is currently available.

The GST portal requires the taxpayer to enter private credentials in its login form. AgentWeb must open a visible private session for the user, persist only the resulting session, and never capture or publish the password.

The live RFN document verification flow requires a six-digit image CAPTCHA after a syntactically valid RFN is entered. AgentWeb must pause for visible user completion and must not automate the challenge.

The live composition opt-in/opt-out search requires a six-character image CAPTCHA after its search mode is selected. AgentWeb must pause for visible user completion and must not automate the challenge.
The live public ARN/SRN/FRN status lookup requires a six-character image CAPTCHA after an identifier is entered. AgentWeb must pause for visible user completion and must not automate the challenge.

The live public GSTIN/UIN lookup renders a required six-digit image CAPTCHA after a valid identifier is entered. AgentWeb must pause for the user to complete it visibly and must not automate or bypass it.
The live public PAN lookup requires a six-character image CAPTCHA after a syntactically valid PAN is entered. AgentWeb must pause for visible user completion and must not automate the challenge.
The public temporary-ID/mobile search displays a required six-character image CAPTCHA before submission. AgentWeb must pause for visible user completion and must not automate the challenge.
Twenty-five safe live searches across five states and five authority types over a three-year range returned no hearings, so a known hearing fixture is required for semantic success evidence.
not_mapped: Excluded operations without current reviewed evidence: track_refund_application
coverage.website_parity: Mapping mode can inspect the remaining website while direct request recipes are compiled. Browser commands are never counted as runtime parity.

description: Experimental, incomplete API for www.gst.gov.in. Available operations have reviewed evidence, but full website parity has not been verified.

errors.message: The description is empty, too long, or not accepted by the GST portal.
errors.user_action: Provide a short plain-language goods or services description and call this operation again.

errors.message: The GST portal classification service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same operation without changing the description.

classification_type.description: Whether to search goods HSN classifications or services SAC classifications.

description.description: A plain-language description of the goods or services to classify.

search_hsn_sac_by_description.name: search_hsn_sac_by_description

matches.description: Candidate classifications returned by the live GST portal in relevance order.

code.description: The candidate HSN or SAC classification code.

description.description: The candidate classification description published by the GST portal.

pagination.behavior: The portal returns a small autocomplete result set and does not expose pagination for this lookup.

result.freshness: Fetched live from the GST portal for every call.
result.truncation: AgentWeb returns at most 25 matches and reports a warning if a larger portal response is truncated.

search_hsn_sac_by_description.summary: Find live GST portal HSN goods or SAC services classification candidates from a plain-language description.

assertions.name: returns at least one classification candidate
returns at least one classification candidate
returns an empty bounded candidate list
returns at least one classification candidate
returns an empty bounded candidate list

search_hsn_sac_by_description.when_not_to_use: Do not treat candidate matches as legal classification advice or as a binding statement by GSTN.
search_hsn_sac_by_description.when_to_use: Use this when the agent has a goods or services description but does not yet know the corresponding HSN or SAC code.

release_warning: This adapter intentionally ships before exhaustive portal coverage. Only listed operations are available; excluded or blocked workflows must not be inferred to work.
